prioritized_items.title: M10.4 doctor --consumer filter
prioritized_items.rationale: Sibling cutover scripts may want bathos-only strict gate without parsing JSON. Small but needs severity-table tweak.

recommendation.rationale: Telemetry operator arc feature-complete; highest leverage is dogfooding M10.2 in CI. OTLP promotion is runner-up but needs docker/flake policy.
